verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Souls in danger, Bodies broken, Trouble here and everywhere, Arms that can't reach where they want to, Somehow make it through whispered prayers.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Whispered prayers ride the wings of Holy angels from here to there, God is listening when we speak them, There is power in whispered prayers.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Dark the midnight, Low the valley, Doesn't seem that life is fair, What we need is our God's presence, It is ours now through whispered prayers.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God is listening when we speak them, There is power in whispered prayers.
